Strict canonical JSON codec for passive WAL frames; this is not a restore codec.

## Import

```ts
import { walFrameCodec } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function walFrameCodec(): Codec<WalFrame<T>>
```

## Returns

A `Codec<WalFrame<T>>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { walFrameCodec } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```
